description: Issues related to available features, playlists, lyrics, recommendations, content completeness, music/podcast availability, and audio listening quality.
Issues related to performance, stability, errors, crashes, loading, responsiveness, interface usability, navigation, and interaction flow.
Issues related to advertisement frequency, interruption, placement, skipping, and perceived disruption in the listening experience.
Issues related to premium subscription, price, payment methods, billing, packages, and perceived value for money.
Issues related to account access, login failures, password, email, verification, registration, and account state problems.
